reviews.text: Helpful and best dentist dr Moniruzzaman dr tasfeya afroz

reviews.name: Rohul amin Hasan
reviews.text: Got best service from DrMoniruzzaman and Dr tasfeya afroz

reviews.name: Saheen Alam
reviews.text:
I think the Cosmic dental service was really better than others.
Specially thanks Dr Moniruzzaman for his careful treatment. I can refer any patients to go this clinic for their dental betterment.

reviews.name: Jubaer Ahmed
reviews.text: Got my scaling done from here, I have to say it was one of the most smoothest scaling I have ever gotten from any dentist. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Syed Din islam
reviews.text: Have a great experience, well behavior & well managed

reviews.name: Mayabi Nusaifa
reviews.text: Best dental Surgeon by Dr. Moniruzzaman  cosmic dental

reviews.name: Afiya Ibnat
reviews.text:
Cosmic Dental offers an exceptional standard of care with a truly professional approach. The dentists are highly skilled, genuinely friendly, and always warm, attentive, and reassuring. The clinic maintains excellent hygiene, creating a calm and comfortable environment for patients. Their treatments are effective, gentle, and reasonably priced.

Overall, it is a trustworthy and commendable choice for quality dental care in Dhaka 🦷🦷

reviews.name: Masud Parvege Rubel
reviews.text:
Friendly jolly minded best dentist
Dr moniruzzaman

reviews.name: Sihab Hossain
reviews.text: Best dental surgeon Dr. Moniruzzaman by cosmic dental

reviews.name: jahir raihan
reviews.text: “এখানের ডাক্তার এবং স্টাফদের ব্যবহার খুবই ভালো। আধুনিক যন্ত্রপাতি দিয়ে সুন্দরভাবে চিকিৎসা করা হয়। আমার দাঁতের সমস্যা অনেকটাই ভালো হয়েছে। Highly recommended!”

reviews.name: Yeasin Arafat
reviews.text: “দাঁতের ব্যথা নিয়ে গিয়েছিলাম, দ্রুত এবং ভালো চিকিৎসা পেয়েছি। ডাক্তার অনেক আন্তরিক ছিলেন।”
